full_text:
Sun He (Zixiao) 孫和 (子孝)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun He (孫和), styledZixiao (子孝). Heir to Sun Quan but quarrelled with his brother Sun Ba. Dismissed by his father. Sun He was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Sun He lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
